heading: Medal of honor; distinguished-service cross; distinguished-service medal; silver star: availability of appropriations
label: 7278 Medal of honor; distinguished-service cross; distinguished-service medal; silver star: availability of appropriations
text: The Secretary of the Army may spend, from any appropriation for contingent expenses of the Department of the Army, amounts necessary to provide medals and devices under sections 7271, 7272, 7273, 7274, 7276, 7277, and 7282 of this title.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)374810:1424.(13th par. under “Ordnance Department”), .July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 871The word “amounts” is substituted for the words “so much as may be”. The word “provide” is substituted for the words “defray the cost of”. The words “medals and devices under” are substituted for the words “medals of honor, distinguished-service crosses, distinguished-service medals, bars, rosettes, and other devices provided for in”. The words “from time to time” are omitted as surplusage.

Amendments2018—, substituted “sections 7271, 7272, 7273, 7274, 7276, 7277, and 7282” for “sections 3741, 3742, 3743, 3744, 3746, 3747, and 3752”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 808(b)(11)section 3748 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
